description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical red fire extinguisher with a slightly domed top and a flat base, designed for upright placement. The body is made of metal and features a prominent white and blue label on the front, displaying pictograms and text for usage instructions and fire class ratings. A black rubber hose is attached near the top, looping down and secured along the side with a black strap, and ending in a nozzle. The top of the extinguisher has a circular metal guard and a pressure gauge is mounted near the hose connection. The surface shows signs of wear, with scuffs and faded paint, indicating regular use or exposure. The overall design is functional and robust, suitable for emergency use in urban environments.
description: A tall, red metal fire extinguisher with a front label, black hose, pressure gauge, and signs of wear. The hose is secured along the side and the top features a protective metal ring.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label, pressure gauge, and the hose attached and secured with a strap.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the cylindrical body, protective top ring, and the absence of labels or controls on this side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the hose running down the side, the black securing strap, and the mostly unmarked metal surface.
description_view_3: Back view showing the full length of the hose and strap, with the label partially visible on the side.
attribute_label_or_signage: Large white and blue label with pictograms and text on the front; label is rectangular and covers a significant portion of the upper body.
attribute_mounting_bracket_or_holder: A black strap is visible around the body, securing the hose, but no dedicated mounting bracket or holder is present.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A black rubber hose is attached near the top, running down the side and secured with a strap; the hose ends in a nozzle.
attribute_pressure_gauge: A round pressure gauge is present near the top, adjacent to the hose connection, with a white face and colored markings.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: A small metallic safety pin is visible at the top near the handle and pressure gauge.
